steps.title: Use the poem's pull
steps.content: The speaker rests deep in the wood because of nature's silent call. In this context, drawn describes being attracted or pulled toward the woods.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: Choice A means unnoticed, which does not fit a call pulling the speaker. Choice B means depicted, and Choice D means imagined; neither describes being lured into the woods. The remaining word captures attraction. The answer is C.
